texto: If there's one thing I've learned in life, if there's one rule I live by, it's never to regret what's happened. Understand by all means, but never regret - it's such a devouring pastime and one that leads nowhere.
explicacao: Citação de Alan Goodwin sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “If there's one thing I've learned in life, if there's one rule I live by, it's never to regret wh…” articula vida, regrets, there em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como regrets.
